Class Tourist

java.lang.Object
Tourist
public class Tourist extends Object
Tourist class represents a tourist participating in the safari simulation. It stores the tourist's ID, alive status, and injury status.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Tourist()
    Default constructor initialises a Tourist with default values.
    Tourist(int touristId)
    Parameterized constructor initialises a Tourist with the given ID.

    Accessor method returns the tourist's injury status.

    Method to apply a major injury to the tourist.

    Method to apply a minor injury to the tourist.
    boolean

    Accessor method returns whether the tourist is alive.
    void

    Method to kill the tourist by setting their alive status to false.

    Mutator method sets the tourist's alive status.

    Mutator method sets the tourist's injury status.
    void

    Mutator method sets the tourist's ID.

    Returns the tourist's details as a formatted String.

    Methods inherited from class Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Tourist

      public Tourist()
      Default constructor initialises a Tourist with default values. Tourist is alive with no injuries and ID set to 0.

    • Tourist

      public Tourist(int touristId)
      Parameterized constructor initialises a Tourist with the given ID. Tourist is alive with no injuries.
      Parameters:
      touristId - the unique positive integer ID of the tourist

  • Method Details

    • getTouristId

      public int getTouristId()
      Accessor method returns the tourist's ID.
      Returns:
      the tourist's ID as a positive integer

    • getInjuryStatus

      public String getInjuryStatus()
      Accessor method returns the tourist's injury status.
      Returns:
      "none", "minor", or "major" as per tourist's injury

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Accessor method returns whether the tourist is alive.
      Returns:
      true if the tourist is alive, false if they have been killed

    • inflictMinorInjury

      public void inflictMinorInjury()
      Method to apply a minor injury to the tourist.

    • inflictMajorInjury

      public void inflictMajorInjury()
      Method to apply a major injury to the tourist.

    • kill

      public void kill()
      Method to kill the tourist by setting their alive status to false.

    • setAlive

      public void setAlive(boolean alive)
      Mutator method sets the tourist's alive status.
      Parameters:
      alive - true if tourist is alive, false otherwise

    • setInjuryStatus

      public void setInjuryStatus(String injuryStatus)
      Mutator method sets the tourist's injury status. Only "none", "minor", or "major" are valid values.
      Parameters:
      injuryStatus - the injury status string

    • setTouristId

      public void setTouristId(int touristId)
      Mutator method sets the tourist's ID. If the ID is not a positive integer, it defaults to 0.
      Parameters:
      touristId - a positive integer ID

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the tourist's details as a formatted String.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a String containing the tourist's ID, alive status, and injury status
